section_miscategorizations.text: Examination reveals left hand pain. Examination also reveals foot pain and numbness and tingling.
section_miscategorizations.reason: These statements simply restate the patient-reported symptoms without adding objective exam detail (e.g., swelling, deformity, ROM, tenderness location). As written, they function more as subjective symptom history than true exam findings, though this is an organizational issue and not substantially misleading.
